calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Floyd Butler, 9:32AM: c/c for jury trial, Steve Williams appears for plaintiff, no appearance by Tina Harrington, defendant in Pro Per. Case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Mr. Williams begins case in chief by calling 1st witness for the plaintiff and beginning direct examination:
ANTHONY BELMONT S/E
EXH1 3 day notice ID/EV
No further questions, witness is thanked and excused. There being no cross-examination plaintiff rests and submits prayer. The Court rules for plaintiff as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises at 88 Perry St., #343, SF, 94107, forfeiture of agreement, $1703.90 rents and damages, and costs per cost bill.

Plaintiff submits judgment form and exhibits are withdrawn and returned. The Court asks plaintiff to call the court ASAP with the actual costs that plaintiff will be submitting before the judgment is entered.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-24-2002 Continued To Dec-30-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
